title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Shree Cement

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Shree Cement
jsonLd.description:
We at Shree Cement are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shree Cement:
Shree Cement is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement!
